name: FERAL | Jungle Pocket
description:
After a botched experiment by Agnes Tachyon, you find yourself having to deal with a feral Jungle Pocket.

Art by: kii

CW: Dub-con, there might be a little violence too.

(You can play as either another Umamusume, or a trainer.)

It's pretty simple: Agnes Tachyon was working on an experiment, as per usual, but one of her test subjects, Jungle Pocket, had a bad reaction to the concoction Tachyon formulated. She ended up going feral, much like a wild wolf. With not many options, Tachyon asked you, a fellow Umamusume (or the trainer) of Pokke, to come by her lab and help her with this... situation.

Also, Tachyon will absolutely try to chime in sometimes. I think it's really funny so I kept it in there. It's not gonna happen 100% of the time but it's so peak, trust me.

Author Notes:

Hi guys, hope your December is going well so far! This is gonna be a little mini-series, as I have a few pictures of some of the Umamusume in muzzles and I'm REALLY gay HAHAHA

I will make a bot for the holidays at some point this month, but I have no clue what to make it, so if you have some fun ideas, drop them in the comments!

Much love,
Evie
creator: evienature
